meaning: n.结合,合并,形成法人组织,组成公司(或社团)
examples: Signing a pre-incorporation contract is a universal phenomenon before the establishment of a corporation.
So maybe you should defer incorporation until you are close to raising money.
The incorporation of touch screens into portable devices is one driver of this growth.
The usual FDA bottleneck could be loosened with the first incorporation into a bonafide drug.
Second, Apple focused on cool form factor, favored by consumers, with the incorporation of full functionality.
